title: Listening - Part 3: Choosing an Online Course
description: You are going to hear five extracts in which people talk about why they enrolled on an online course. For questions 19–23, choose from the list A–H the main reason each speaker gives for choosing the course. Use the letters once only. There are three letters that you do not need to use.
instructions: You are going to hear five extracts in which people talk about why they enrolled on an online course. For questions 19–23, choose from the list A–H the main reason each speaker gives for choosing the course. Use the letters once only. There are three letters that you do not need to use.

extracts.context: Five people talk about choosing an online course.
extracts.audio_script: Speaker 1 Woman: I work for a small company that sells sports equipment, and recently I've been asked to help with our online advertising. I use social media personally, but that doesn't mean I know how to promote products professionally. [19]I signed up for a digital marketing course because I wanted to produce better campaigns at work and show my manager that I could take on more responsibility.[/19] The course takes up two evenings each week, but I've already suggested changes to our website that were accepted.||Speaker 2 Man: My brother married someone from Brazil, and their children are growing up speaking both Portuguese and English. When we have video calls, they understand me, but I can't follow the jokes they share with their mother. [20]I chose a beginner's Portuguese course mainly because I'd like to talk naturally to my nephews in the language they use with half of their family.[/20] My pronunciation makes them laugh at the moment, but they're very patient and already send me short voice messages to practise with.||Speaker 3 Woman: I'm starting university in September and will be living away from home for the first time. My parents have always cooked, and when I tried making a meal alone, I managed to burn pasta, which is quite an achievement. [21]I enrolled on a basic cookery course because I need to feed myself sensibly when I move into student accommodation instead of depending on expensive takeaway meals.[/21] The lessons use cheap ingredients, and I can now prepare several dishes without having to call my mother for instructions.||Speaker 4 Man: I volunteer at a local sports club for young children. We had a website, but it hadn't been updated for years, and parents kept asking the same questions about training times. None of the other volunteers wanted to deal with it. [22]I decided to do an online web-design course so I could create clear pages for the club and make it easier for families to find the information they need.[/22] I'm still learning, but the new timetable page has already reduced the number of phone calls we receive.||Speaker 5 Woman: I work with numbers all day, so I wanted an evening activity completely separate from my job. I'd always admired illustrations in children's books, although whenever I tried drawing, the results looked flat and uninteresting. [23]The online drawing course appealed to me because it would teach me techniques for an artistic hobby I had wanted to explore for years.[/23] Nobody is judging my pictures, which is good, and I'm gradually learning how to use colour and shadow. It's the most relaxing part of my week.

dialogue.speaker: speaker_1
dialogue.text: I work for a small company that sells sports equipment, and recently I've been asked to help with our online advertising. I use social media personally, but that doesn't mean I know how to promote products professionally. I signed up for a digital marketing course because I wanted to produce better campaigns at work and show my manager that I could take on more responsibility. The course takes up two evenings each week, but I've already suggested changes to our website that were accepted.

dialogue.speaker: speaker_2
dialogue.text: My brother married someone from Brazil, and their children are growing up speaking both Portuguese and English. When we have video calls, they understand me, but I can't follow the jokes they share with their mother. I chose a beginner's Portuguese course mainly because I'd like to talk naturally to my nephews in the language they use with half of their family. My pronunciation makes them laugh at the moment, but they're very patient and already send me short voice messages to practise with.

dialogue.speaker: speaker_3
dialogue.text: I'm starting university in September and will be living away from home for the first time. My parents have always cooked, and when I tried making a meal alone, I managed to burn pasta, which is quite an achievement. I enrolled on a basic cookery course because I need to feed myself sensibly when I move into student accommodation instead of depending on expensive takeaway meals. The lessons use cheap ingredients, and I can now prepare several dishes without having to call my mother for instructions.

dialogue.speaker: speaker_4
dialogue.text: I volunteer at a local sports club for young children. We had a website, but it hadn't been updated for years, and parents kept asking the same questions about training times. None of the other volunteers wanted to deal with it. I decided to do an online web-design course so I could create clear pages for the club and make it easier for families to find the information they need. I'm still learning, but the new timetable page has already reduced the number of phone calls we receive.

dialogue.speaker: speaker_5
dialogue.text: I work with numbers all day, so I wanted an evening activity completely separate from my job. I'd always admired illustrations in children's books, although whenever I tried drawing, the results looked flat and uninteresting. The online drawing course appealed to me because it would teach me techniques for an artistic hobby I had wanted to explore for years. Nobody is judging my pictures, which is good, and I'm gradually learning how to use colour and shadow. It's the most relaxing part of my week.

options.text: to improve their performance at work
to understand a personal financial matter
to meet people with similar interests
to help with a voluntary role

questions.speaker: Speaker 1
questions.explanation: The speaker is studying digital marketing in order to do better work and take on more responsibility.

questions.speaker: Speaker 2
questions.explanation: The speaker wants Portuguese skills in order to communicate with her nephews in their other family language.

questions.speaker: Speaker 3
questions.explanation: The speaker is taking a cooking course so she can manage meals when living away from home.

questions.speaker: Speaker 4
questions.explanation: The speaker learned web design in order to improve information for a club where he volunteers.

questions.speaker: Speaker 5
questions.explanation: The speaker enrolled in order to develop a long-standing artistic interest in drawing.
